subject: Science
description: Grade 3 Science assessment on plant structures
question: Which plant part absorbs water from soil
explanation: Roots have tiny hairs that absorb water and minerals from the soil

subject: Science
description: Grade 3 Science assessment on plant structures
question: Which part carries water to the leaves
explanation: The stem transports water and nutrients between the roots and leaves

subject: Math
description: Introduction to fractions for middle primary
question: What is one half plus one quarter
explanation: Convert to common denominator: two quarters plus one quarter equals three quarters

subject: Math
description: Introduction to fractions for middle primary
question: Which fraction equals two quarters
explanation: Two quarters simplifies to one half by dividing both numerator and denominator by two

subject: Science
question: At what temperature does water boil at sea level
explanation: Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure

subject: Science
question: Which state has definite shape and volume
explanation: Solids have tightly packed particles that maintain a fixed shape and volume

subject: English
description: Parts of speech and sentence structure
question: Which word is the verb in: The cat sleeps on the sofa
explanation: A verb describes an action or state. Sleeps is the action word in this sentence

subject: English
description: Parts of speech and sentence structure
question: What is the plural form of child
explanation: Irregular nouns like child change to children in plural form
